return(function(K,O,C,P,i,H,T,y,t,N,f,e,p,Z,W,B,r,s,V,F)r,F,V,s,e,f,W,p,t,B,y,N,Z=952375-952375,function(K,U)local O=p(U)local C=function(...)return N(K,{...},U,O)end return C
